Container.Name: bind
Container.Overview: Self-hosted audiobook RSS indexer. Scrapes AudioBookBay on a configurable interval and serves a filterable RSS feed and web UI.

Config.Name: Data Volume
Config.Description: Persistent storage for the SQLite database and auto-generated secret key.

Config.Name: BIND_DB_PATH
Config.Description: Path inside the container where the SQLite database is stored. Do not change unless you remapped the data volume.

Config.Name: FLASK_SECRET_KEY
Config.Description: Optional. Pin the Flask session key so sessions survive container restarts. Leave blank to auto-generate.
